desc: Opens the Object Settings & Styles window for managing Revit object styles, line styles, line patterns, fill patterns, and materials.
summary: Opens the Object Settings & Styles window for managing Revit object styles, line styles, line patterns, fill patterns, and materials. Uses ObjectSettingsAndStylesWindow.ShowSingleton for singleton behaviour.
usecase: User wants to view or edit object styles, line styles, line patterns, fill patterns, or materials.
notfor: Changing individual element overrides per view (use Filter & Template Manager instead).
postcondition: Object Settings & Styles window is visible.

successprompts: Object Settings & Styles window is open.
failureprompts: Could not open Object Settings & Styles: {error}
